title: Structs, Methods, Method Sets, Embedding, and Composition · Contract Triage
summary: A job scheduler needs explicit domain records, validated transitions, method behavior, and composition without accidental promotion. Learners isolate plausible failures, compare competing hypotheses, and record cause-level repair evidence. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in a validated job-domain model and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defe…
objectives: Design structs, field visibility, literals, zero states, comparison, and tags as explicit data contracts.
Choose value or pointer receivers from mutation, copying, nil behavior, consistency, and method-set evidence.
Predict method sets, implicit address-taking, interface satisfaction, and behavior of named pointer and value types.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
